news.title: Trump-backed World Liberty Financial nears OCC approval for federal trust charter: report
news.summary: The federal trust bank charter grant would allow World Liberty to issue and redeem its USD1 stablecoin under a single federal regulator.

news.title: Hyperliquid open interest surges 32% in a week: Is $80 HYPE next?
news.summary: Despite mixed HYPE derivatives market signals, Hyperliquid’s explosive TradFi perpetual growth makes a push toward $80 increasingly realistic.

news.title: Senators urge Treasury ensure state authority in GENIUS application
news.summary: A bipartisan group of US senators told the Treasury that its application of stablecoin laws should be done in a way that “preserves and promotes State participation.”
